description: This file defines various reusable UI components such as Container, Card, Button, Input, Textarea, Badge, and SectionTitle, for use in a React application. It primarily contains functional component definitions with styling and behavior for UI elements.

methods.name: Container
methods.description: A layout component that centers its children within a maximum width container.

methods.name: Card
methods.description: A styled container with rounded borders, shadow, and optional additional classes.

methods.name: Button
methods.description: A customizable button component supporting different variants and click behavior.

methods.name: Input
methods.description: A styled input field supporting labels and change handling.

methods.name: Textarea
methods.description: A styled textarea supporting labels and change handling.

methods.name: Badge
methods.description: A small, styled label component for displaying tags or status indicators.

methods.name: SectionTitle
methods.description: A header component with title and optional subtitle for sections.
